content:
Indeed, it did double back near the end. No worries—I followed your journey clearly up to that point. You were closing by reflecting on how, over the last 10–12 years, your life has become more stationary due to aging and physical wear, yet you’ve remained in a tent-based, urban camping lifestyle. The fragment that got repeated was:

> “years ago, I was a habitual drinker and user of marijuana, although I could do without both for any amount of time at any...”

I believe you meant to wrap up the story by returning to that point and possibly completing your reflection on your relationship with substances, particularly after having quit them around three years ago.
